findings.evidence: Word 'spearo' at 311.68s has low confidence (0.7861). Loose transcription 'spiro' also wrong. Correct Pokemon name is 'Spearow' (Gen 1 bird #22). Only one correct spelling exists.

Word 'honest' at 316.82s has low confidence (0.7632). Near splice point v6 317.65s. Appears in both transcripts. Re-transcription with large-v3 confirms word is authentic. Likely speaker nickname for trainer ('Honest Abe Lincoln' reference), not hallucination. Capitalize as proper name reference.
Default word 'going' (prob 0.5386) vs loose 'gonna'. Low confidence and colloquial speech pattern favor 'gonna'. Loose choice more natural for conversational tone.
Trainer name: default 'faulkner' (low conf 0.7807), loose 'falconer' (wrong). Correct is 'Faulkner' (Flying gym leader). Default closer to correct spelling.
Second instance of 'gonna' vs 'going' with low prob (0.7739). Speaker uses consistent colloquial speech. Normalize to 'gonna' throughout.
Move name capitalization: default capitalizes (proper form per official Pokemon naming), loose lowercases. Stylistic choice but default follows conventions.
Loose splits Pokemon name 'geo dudes' into two words. Correct form is single word 'Geodudes' (plural of Geodude). Default correct.
Both transcripts have 'starfish' (casual nickname), but subject Pokemon is 'Staryu'. Speaker uses descriptive term but formal transcript should use Pokemon name. Both versions have same error.
Location name capitalization: default capitalizes 'Azalea Town' (proper form), loose lowercases. Default follows standard location naming conventions.

findings.default_text: And I'm just going to rotate between my moves, so let's go Water Gun on the Kakuna. It goes hardened, we can go tackle after that.
findings.loose_text: I'm just going to rotate between my moves. So let's go Water Gun on the Kakuna. It goes hardened. we can go tackle after that we get poison sting but we simply water gun it down from there out comes the scyther i'm going to tackle it once as it starts building up fury cutter it
findings.corrected_text: I'm just going to rotate between my moves. So let's go Water Gun on the Kakuna. It goes hardened. We can go tackle after that. We get Poison Sting, but we simply Water Gun it down from there. Out comes the Scyther. I'm going to tackle it once as it starts building up Fury Cutter.
findings.evidence: Default Whisper (repetition penalty) truncated at ~577s. Loose captured full dialogue including 'out comes the scyther...' sequence. Default incomplete. Loose is fuller but needs capitalization applied.
Pokemon name capitalization: default capitalizes (standard for Pokemon names), loose lowercases. Formatting choice but default is correct convention.

notes_for_main_thread: Chunk 01 has 11 findings: (1) Pokemon name errors - 'spearo'/'spiro' should be 'Spearow', 'falconer' should be 'Faulkner', 'starfish' nickname should be 'Staryu', 'geo dudes' should be 'Geodudes'; (2) Trainer name issues - 'faulkner' needs capitalization to 'Faulkner'; (3) Colloquial form - 'going' should be 'gonna' (2x, low confidence <55%); (4) Capitalization issues - Pokemon/move/location names need consistent capitalization (Scyther, Fury Cutter, Azalea Town); (5) Content truncation - Default Whisper (segments 56-59) merged multiple dialogue clips via repetition penalty; loose transcription captured fuller content. The 'Honest Abe' section (v6 316-317s) is authentic audio confirmed by large-v3 re-transcription; likely speaker nickname for gym leader. No splice hallucinations. Recommendation: use loose transcript for segments 56-59, apply proper capitalization to all Pokemon/trainer/move/location names, normalize 'gonna' throughout.
